name: Fiesta Pasta Mexican
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 ounces dark red kidney beans, drained and washed
1/2 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan over medium heat, heat olive oil.
3. Add onions and bell peppers. Cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until tender.
4. Stir spaghetti sauce, kidney beans, water, and taco seasoning mix. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat; cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
6. Toss hot pasta with one-half of the sauce.
7. Spoon remaining sauce over top; sprinkle with cheese.
